---
name: Specification bug
about: Report an error, ambiguity, or inconsistency in the spec, schema, or examples
title: "<short description>"
labels: ["bug"]
---

## Summary

<!--
One or two sentences, in plain language: what's wrong and why it matters. The details go in the
sections below — this is just so a reader grasps the issue at a glance.
-->

## Where

- [ ] `spec/plugin-spec-v1.md` (section: ____)
- [ ] `spec/best-practices.md`
- [ ] `schemas/plugin.schema.json`
- [ ] `examples/`
- [ ] `tools/validate.py`
- [ ] Other: ____

## What's wrong

Describe the error, ambiguity, or contradiction. Quote the exact text if it helps.

## Expected / suggested fix

What the correct or clearer wording or behaviour should be.

## Impact

Does this affect what a conformant plugin or Host must do, or is it editorial only?
